name: Barbell Hip Thrust
resistance_profile: Peak glute tension in the shortened (top) position; a strong contraction-biased glute builder.
rom_notes: Lower under control, drive to full hip extension with a hard glute squeeze.
cues: Drive through the heels to full lockout
Squeeze the glutes at the top, no lumbar hyperextension
common_errors: Overarching the lower back at the top
Short range / not reaching full extension
